121 
PRVDR_NUM_SYS 
LABEL: 
Provider Number System/Nomenclature 
DESCRIPTION: A code to identify the kind of provider identifier that is captured in the PRVDR_NUM data element. 
SHORT NAME: PRVDR_NUM_SYS 
LONG NAME: PRVDR_NUM_SYS 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
FILE(S): 
APR Identifiers 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS annual provider TAF 
VALUES: 
1: State-specific Medicaid provider ID
